title: lastrea alta
intro: Lastrea alta, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea alta include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lastrea alta can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
